subject: MASTER search for counterpart to the IceCube event 67093193 (run 127853)
submitter: Vladimir Lipunov at Moscow State U/Krylov Obs  <lipunov@xray.sai.msu.ru>
body:
V. Lipunov, E.Gorbovskoy, V.Kornilov, D.Kuvshinov, N.Tyurina, P.Balanutsa,
A.Kuznetsov, V.V.Chazov
Lomonosov Moscow State University,Sternberg Astronomical Institute

V.Yurkov, Yu.Sergienko, A.Gabovich
Blagoveschensk Educational State University, Blagoveschensk

R. Rebolo, M. Serra Ricart,  N. Lodieu, G. Israelian
The Instituto de Astrofisica de Canarias

N.M.Budnev, K.Ivanov, S.Yazev, O.Gres, O.Chuvalaev, 
V.A.Poleshchuk
Irkutsk State University

D.Buckley, S. Potter, M.Kotze, A.Kniazev
South African Astronomical Observatory

MASTER received AMON ICECUBE HESE alert 
(http://gcn.gsfc.nasa.gov/notices_amon/67093193_127853.amon, 
DISCOVERY_TIME:   16/04/27 05:52:32.00 UT)
at 27 Apr 16 05:53:53 UT .

MASTER-IAC pointed to 15h 58m 39s +06d 51' 10  155 sec after trigger time 
and 74 sec after notice time.
But the Sun Altitude was -8.27, i.e.the beginning of sunrise.

But 4 hours befor MASTER-IAC made a survey in this area
---------------------------------------------------------------------
The centers of obs.area(2x2d)      The time_start,UT   Exp.  m_lim Tube

15h 57m 30.7s +08d 02m 48s Survey 2016-04-27 01:51:16   60   19.3W WEST
15h 57m 29.1s +08d 03m 10s Survey 2016-04-27 01:40:42   60   19.3W WEST
15h 57m 30.3s +08d 02m 47s Survey 2016-04-27 01:30:29   60   19.3W WEST
---------------------------------------------------------------------

2) The second message of alert was at 27 Apr 16 15:51:18 UT
MASTER-Amur pointed 283 sec 
on 2016-04-27 15:56:01UT  (60s exp., 17.0 P on the first image, 17.7 on 
the summ images 540s)

3) MASTER-IAC started observations of the corrected alert coordinates  16h 
02m 16s +09d 20' 30"  on 2016-04-27 23:25:11UT 47 sec after notice time
  with m_lim=19.3 on the single images, 19.8 on the summ.
There is no OT inside 36 arcmin radius(the error box).

4) MASTER-SAAO started observations on the 2016-04-28 02:43:11 UT with 
m_lim=19.6 . There is no OT inside the error box.


The message may be cited.
